name.en: Pum Riang Village and Laem Pho

address: Pum Riang and Laem Pho, Chaiya District, Surat Thani
opening_hours: Public village and park timing is generally straightforward during daytime, but local shop, weaving, and seafood timing varies.

description.en: A useful textile-and-seafood coastal extension built around Pum Riang silk and Laem Pho's seafood side.
description.nl: Een bruikbare textiel- en seafood-kustextensie rond Pum Riang-zijde en Laem Pho.

metaTitle.en: Pum Riang Village and Laem Pho | Go2Thailand
metaTitle.nl: Pum Riang-dorp en Laem Pho | Go2Thailand

metaDescription.en: Why Pum Riang and Laem Pho are a stronger textile-and-seafood extension from Surat Thani than generic coastal filler.
metaDescription.nl: Waarom Pum Riang en Laem Pho een sterkere textiel- en seafood-extensie vanuit Surat Thani zijn dan generieke kustfiller.

enhanced_description:
Pum Riang and Laem Pho are useful only when you know why you are going. The value is not a generic coast stop but the combination of Pum Riang silk, village life, seafood, and Laem Pho's mainland shoreline character.

TAT's current English community feature still presents them that way, which makes this a much better edited coastal extension than weak filler about unspecified beaches or bays. Add it after the city and one main extension, not before.
detailed_history: Tourism Product's current English feature still links Pum Riang to local silk weaving, village trades, and Laem Pho's seafood identity, making the pair a coherent mainland craft-and-coast story within the wider Chaiya side of the province.
visitor_experience: Expect a village-and-coastal extension rather than a resort beach day. This is about craft, local food, and a quieter mainland edge, not about polished beach infrastructure.

practical_info.how_to_get_there: Best combined with a Chaiya-side route rather than attempted from the city as an isolated quick stop.
practical_info.nearby_attractions: Wat Phra Borommathat Chaiya is the obvious heritage pairing if you are already on the Chaiya side.
practical_info.food_options: Seafood is part of the point here, so plan at least one proper stop around the coast or village area.
practical_info.shopping: Pum Riang silk is the clearest reason to shop here.

insider_tips: Only add this if you genuinely have room for a second mainland extension.
This works best with Chaiya, not as a rushed add-on after a full city day.
Keep the focus on silk, seafood, and village texture.
verified_note: Source-backed summary based on current TAT Tourism Product coverage for Pum Riang and Laem Pho.
cultural_significance: Pum Riang and Laem Pho matter because they keep Surat Thani tied to mainland silk traditions, fishing, and a local coastal economy rather than just to island transfer routes.

contentSources.name: Check-in at Surat Thani for 2 Days and 1 Night: Enjoying Without the Sea
